We will notify you about significant changes in the way we treat personal information by sending a notice to the primary email address specified in your primary account holder account or by placing a prominent notice on our site.

decoder_heading: Your privacy is very important to us
ident_heading: Your privacy is very important to us
heading_content_part: Your privacy is very important to us. Accordingly, we have developed this Policy in order for you to understand how we collect, use, communicate and disclose and make use of personal information.

decoder_heading: We will collect and use of personal information solely with the objective of fulfilling those purposes specified by us
ident_heading: We will collect and use of personal information solely with the objective of fulfilling those purposes specified by us
heading_content_part: We will collect and use of personal information solely with the objective of fulfilling those purposes specified by us and for other compatible purposes, unless we obtain the consent of the individual concerned or as required by law.

decoder_heading: We will only retain personal information as long as necessary for the fulfillment of those purposes
ident_heading: We will only retain personal information as long as necessary for the fulfillment of those purposes
heading_content_part: We will only retain personal information as long as necessary for the fulfillment of those purposes.

decoder_heading: We will collect personal information by lawful and fair means
ident_heading: We will collect personal information by lawful and fair means
heading_content_part: We will collect personal information by lawful and fair means and, where appropriate, with the knowledge or consent of the individual concerned. Personal data should be relevant to the purposes for which it is to be used, and, to the extent necessary for those purposes, should be accurate, complete, and up-to-date.

decoder_heading: We will protect personal information by reasonable security safeguards
ident_heading: We will protect personal information by reasonable security safeguards
heading_content_part: We will protect personal information by reasonable security safeguards against loss or theft, as well as unauthorized access, disclosure, copying, use or modification.

decoder_heading: We will make readily available to customers information about our policies and practices relating to the management of personal information
ident_heading: We will make readily available to customers information about our policies and practices relating to the management of personal information
heading_content_part: We will make readily available to customers information about our policies and practices relating to the management of personal information. We are committed to conducting our business in accordance with these principles in order to ensure that the confidentiality of personal information is protected and maintained. Any questions about this Privacy Policy should be contact us.
